name: Western Union
description_short: Cincinnati's Western Union at 11390 Montgomery Rd offers check cashing and money transfers, open 6AM–10PM daily.
description_long:
Western Union's standalone branch at 11390 Montgomery Rd in Cincinnati, OH provides check-cashing services and money transfers in the north side of the city. The location operates seven days a week from 6 AM to 10 PM, making it convenient for both early morning and evening transactions. This Cincinnati location is easily accessible for residents throughout the greater Cincinnati area.

At this Montgomery Rd location in Cincinnati, the staff can cash checks, process money orders, and facilitate domestic and international wire transfers. Contact the branch at 513-247-7740 to confirm current service availability or ask about specific transaction limits and fees. All standard transactions require a valid government-issued ID.

Cincinnati residents rely on Western Union for immediate check-cashing when they need cash quickly without waiting for bank processing. Remember to bring your valid ID and the checks you want to cash, along with any documentation needed for wire transfers. The 6 AM opening time serves shift workers and early risers throughout the city.
pros: Extensive global agent network with 500,000+ locations including major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, Circle K, Kroger)
24/7 online money transfer initiation through WU.com with ability to complete payments in-store
Multiple service options including cash pickup, bill payment, mobile top-up, money orders, and prepaid card deposits
Extended location hours with some agent locations open until 11:59 PM for added convenience
Multilingual support available in six languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Western Union Rewards program and referral incentives for frequent customers
Track transfer functionality allowing customers to monitor money movement in real-time
cons: Fees and exchange rates not disclosed on website; customers must contact specific locations or use online estimator
Service availability dependent on individual agent locations and their operating hours
Money Order Services listed as unavailable at certain agent locations (example: Circle K #0682)
Reliance on third-party retail partners means service quality inconsistency across different agent locations
Online transfer initiation requires in-store completion, creating a two-step process for many transactions
best_for: International money senders needing reliable cash pickup networks in multiple countries
Customers without traditional bank accounts seeking bill payment and financial services
Multilingual customers preferring non-English service options
Individuals needing extended-hours access to financial services beyond traditional banking hours
diagnosis: Western Union is best for customers needing convenient access to money transfer, cash pickup, and bill payment services through an extensive retail network with multilingual support and extended hours. The primary caveat is that actual service fees, transfer limits, and exchange rates are not visible on the company's location-finder pages, requiring customers to contact specific agents or use online estimators before committing to transactions.
services: Western Union Prepaid card account services
Receive money on prepaid card option
Online money transfer initiation (24/7 via WU.com)
meta_description: Western Union at 11390 Montgomery Rd, Cincinnati, OH. Check cashing and money transfers, open 6AM–10PM daily.
